title: Remove Duplicate Login (2) Component
context: The dummy-repo contains a duplicate file "Login.jsx" that is identical to "Login (2).jsx". This creates redundant nodes in the architecture graph and confuses the visualization.
instructions: Delete the file "src/dummy-repo/Login.jsx", then run "node generateData.js" to regenerate the mock data. Verify that the graph now shows 4 nodes instead of 5.
acceptanceCriteria: No duplicate entries in roadmap or file summaries

knowledgeCheck.question: What is the primary purpose of the "Login()" function in Login.jsx?
knowledgeCheck.hint: Coordinates the execution cycle for the local `Login` workflow handle inside the runtime sequence.

knowledgeCheck.question: What regex pattern does generateData.js use to detect function declarations in the code?
How many total files are currently in the dummy-repo directory?
Which three JSON files does generateData.js create in the mockData directory?
Which React component is responsible for rendering the interactive architecture graph?
